reasoning: This workout directly targets lactate clearance, underdeveloped aerobic base, and low fatigue resistance by incorporating over-unders and extended sweet spot segments. After your extended rest, it's crucial to build into intensity controlled to mimic the demands of the Alpine Loop by practicing these intervals.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 minutes over-unders: alternate 2 minutes at 209-223W with 2 minutes at 242-256W; 3-minute recovery between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
